reasoning: The focus today is on improving your lactate clearance and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed reduced intensity after a long break, making today ideal for a controlled yet targeted session. With the Alpine Loop's main climb in mind, we'll hone your ability to handle sustained effort with over-unders.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Start with 8 minutes at 209W, followed by 2 minutes at 242W, repeat 5 times.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
